name: Select

aliases.name: Item
aliases.type: { id : String.String, label : String.String, identity : item, isSelectable : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe (Select.Item item), toItem : item -> Select.Item item, runSearch : Select.Search item -> ( Select.Search item, Maybe.Maybe (Select.Msg item) ), search : Select.Search item, mode : Select.OpenState, searchDebouncer : Debouncer.Basic.Debouncer (Select.Msg item) (Select.Msg item), autocompleteIndex : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, allowMultipleFilters : Basics.Bool, minimumSearchTermsLength : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Search
aliases.type: { filters : Select.Filters, terms : Maybe.Maybe String.String, items : List.List (Select.Item item), results : RemoteData.WebData (Select.Items item) }

values.name: basicInit
values.comment: Minimum model creation. This will be split out into 'RequiredModel' in future
values.type: msg -> String.String -> Basics.Int -> List.List (Select.Item item) -> Maybe.Maybe (Select.Item item) -> (item -> Select.Item item) -> (Select.Search item -> ( Select.Search item, Maybe.Maybe (Select.Msg item) )) -> Select.Model item

values.name: isOpen
values.comment: Check if selector is open or not

values.name: update
values.comment: Update function in future it will have a third el to its tuple for synchronisation
values.type: Select.Msg a -> Select.Model a -> ( Select.Model a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Select.Msg a) )
